MCQ: Who coined the term machine learning in 1959?
Choices: a: Alan Turing | b: Arthur Samuel | c: Donald Hebb | d: Tom M. Mitchell

MCQ: What was the name of the experimental 'learning machine' developed by Raytheon Company in the early 1960s?
Choices: a: Cybertron | b: AlphaGo | c: GANs | d: Learning Machines

MCQ: According to Tom M. Mitchell, what is required for a computer program to be said to learn from experience?
Choices: a: Its performance at tasks should decrease with experience | b: Its performance at tasks should remain the same with experience | c: Its performance at tasks should improve with experience | d: Its performance at tasks is not related to experience

MCQ: Who introduced generative adversarial networks (GANs) in 2014?
Choices: a: Ian Goodfellow and others | b: Tom M. Mitchell and others | c: Arthur Samuel and others | d: Alan Turing and others

MCQ: What type of learning technique was used by AlphaGo to win against top human players in Go in 2016?
Choices: a: Supervised Learning | b: Unsupervised Learning | c: Reinforcement Learning | d: Deep Learning
